lines.speaker: Wandering impling
lines.text: Is it here? Is it there? Is it elsewhere?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't know gates had relations.

lines.speaker: Wandering impling
lines.text: Oh yes. This one here - she is calm and boring. She stays here all the time. She doesn't like to move, but her sister is fidgety and refuses to stay in the same place for more than half an hour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where is the, errr, fidgety sister at the moment?

lines.speaker: Wandering impling
lines.text: Oh well. I don't know what you humans call these places. Let me show you.

lines.speaker: Wandering impling
lines.text: Is it here? Is it there? Is it elsewhere?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't know gates had relations.

lines.speaker: Wandering impling
lines.text: Oh yes. This one here - she is calm and boring. She stays here all the time. She doesn't like to move, but her sister is fidgety and refuses to stay in the same place for more than half an hour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where is the, errr, fidgety sister at the moment?

lines.speaker: Wandering impling
lines.text: Oh she's asleep at the moment. I'm sure she'll go somewhere in the next half an hour though.

sections.title: (Leagues only) If the sister portal is in a locked region

lines.speaker: Wandering impling
lines.text: I cannot show you this gate's sister on this world.
